name: 埃什雷夫·雷布罗克
name_full: 埃什雷夫·雷布罗克 Eshref Reybrouck

last_movies.title: 属于我们的城市 第一季

introduction: Eshref Reybrouck is a Belgian director who graduated from the Royal Institute of Theatre, Cinema and Sounds in Brussels. His most recent work is OCS-original CHEYENNE & LOLA. Prior to this, he directed Netflix-hit UNDERCOVER.Eshref started his professional career as a first AD working for over a dozen Belgian productions. In 2013 he made his directorial debut with MARSMAN, an 8 part series for Belgian national broadcaster Eén, which received numerous selections at international festivals and won the Prix Italia for Best TV Drama and 2 awards at FIPA in Biarritz, as well as several television awards in Belgium.In 2016 he made the entire second season of CORDON, a Flemish series, which received a US remake as CONTAINMENT and he also worked on multiple sketches for the Emmy award winning comedy series WHAT IF? In 2017, he made his international debut working on two episodes of the Swedish-Belgian crime series HASSEL, starring Ola Rapace.
